title: Local Date and Time Stamp (0x62)
description: Local Date and Time Stamp triplet layout. Length and TID are not mapped here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: StampType
elements.description: Date/time stamp type: '00' = Creation, '01' = Retired value, '03' = Revision

elements.name: THunYear
elements.description: Hundreds position and implied thousands position of year AD. Examples: '40' = 19xx, 'F0'..'F9' = 20xx-29xx (encoded as hex digits).

elements.name: TenYear
elements.description: Tens and units position of year AD (two BCD/hex digits).

elements.name: Day
elements.description: Day of year (three-digit value encoded as three bytes/characters).

notes: TID for this triplet is X'62'. Length field (offset 0) and TID (offset 1) are intentionally not mapped per instructions.
